name: Mountain Province Diamonds Inc.
description: Mountain Province Diamonds Inc. is a Canadian diamond mining company. The company's primary asset is its 49% interest in the Gahcho Kué diamond mine located in the Northwest Territories of Canada, which is one of the world's largest and highest-grade new diamond mines. Mountain Province Diamonds is also actively involved in the exploration and development of its surrounding mineral properties, seeking to discover new kimberlites and expand its diamond resources.
